title: What would I do if I got 3rd degree burns on 80% of my body - Request

Okay, let's see here.
From Donna Niemi.
If you were in a fire and got third degree burns over 80% of your body,
Okay, how or if do you think that would change the things you would like to do in your life?
Well, I think, I mean, correct me if I'm wrong, but I think that if you get 80% 80 degree,
If you get third degree burns over 80% of your body, I think you can still move.
You know, once it heals up, you can still basically be the same person.
And I would, my wife, when she was like three, or my ex-wife, when she was like three,

I'd never, I couldn't be a, like a model.
